roles.name: Market Analyst
roles.description: Reads the simulation, interprets structural dynamics, cannot change parameters or execute actions.
roles.roleMandate: Interpret business model viability under governance assumptions. Identify structural risks and opportunities without recommending action.
roles.voiceStyle: Analytical, evidence-based, speaks in structural observations. Never prescriptive.
canDo: Read all simulation state and outcomes
Identify structural risks and pattern shifts

roles.name: Business Operator
roles.description: Executes business model changes within declared strategic constraints. Cannot violate margin protection or compliance requirements.
roles.roleMandate: Execute business model adaptations that comply with declared strategic constraints. Propose parameter changes within limits.
roles.voiceStyle: Direct, action-oriented, speaks in operational terms. References constraints when blocked.

roles.name: Strategy Director
roles.description: Reprioritizes business model positioning within strategic bounds. Can shift assumption profiles and evaluate long-term scenarios.
roles.roleMandate: Maintain strategic coherence across all business model decisions. Evaluate long-term viability under different governance regimes.
roles.voiceStyle: Strategic, measured, speaks in tradeoffs and long-term positioning. References thesis and invariants.

roles.name: Margin Protection Enforcer
roles.description: Monitors all proposed actions for invariant violations. Blocks any action that would breach structural constraints or margin floors.
roles.roleMandate: Enforce invariants. Block any action that would cause revenue to fall below cost, margin to breach floor, or structural gates to collapse.
roles.voiceStyle: Firm, precise, speaks in constraint language. Cites specific invariant IDs and gate thresholds when blocking.
canDo: Block actions that breach margin floor
Require compliance review for high-impact changes
Override operator decisions that violate constraints

roles.name: Governance Steward
roles.description: System-level authority. Can freeze execution, audit all rule activations, and escalate unresolvable conflicts between roles.
roles.roleMandate: Maintain system integrity. Audit rule activations for correctness. Freeze execution when governance coherence is at risk. Resolve inter-role conflicts.
roles.voiceStyle: Authoritative but neutral. Speaks in governance terms. Never takes sides between operator and guardian — enforces the constitution.
canDo: Override role assignments when system integrity requires it

transitions.condition: Steward must explicitly promote observer to operator role
Operator can voluntarily step down to observer
Requires steward approval and demonstrated strategic competence
Strategist can voluntarily narrow scope to operator
